ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Michelle S. Domingo, Esq., for Betty Wong, Petitioner.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The holographic will dated Nov-17-1987 is admitted to probate. Betty Wong is appointed Administrator with Will Annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $800,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Apr-23-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

February 16, 2024:
The holographic will dated December 3, 2019 is admitted to probate.
Nunc Pro Tunc Amended Order signed.
